gauge.name: Tar River at NC97 In Rocky Mount

impacts.statement: This is the flood of record, set after hurricane Floyd on September 17, 1999.
The section of NC97 north of the river floods to about the intersection with US64.
Spruce Street at NC97 is flooded.
East Virginia Street floods east of the wastewater plant.
The on-ramps to US64 at NC97 begin to flood.
Several streets west of business US301 are flooded, including E Ridge Street and Melton Drive.
Flood stage. Flooding reaches Melton Drive and E Ridge Street.
Action stage. Water begins flowing into the city sewer system.
